prompt: Create a bright Japanese summer beverage advertisement poster for POCARI SWEAT, in the style of a 2009 seaside TV commercial key visual. Full vertical poster composition, photorealistic, high-key daylight, vivid blue sky, white clouds, ocean and distant mountains in the background, a sunlit waterfront promenade with railings, and the side of a white building on the right. A teenage Japanese schoolgirl stands full body slightly right of center, viewed from a low angle, wearing a white sailor-style school uniform blouse with navy collar and blue necktie, a navy pleated skirt, white knee-high socks, and black loafers. Her face is deliberately anonymized with a smooth rectangular blur, while her long dark hair and natural pose remain visible. She holds a small blue-and-white drink bottle near her mouth as if drinking, looking fresh and hydrated. Add exactly 3 visible branded text areas: top left small Otsuka logo with Japanese company name, large left-center Japanese copy reading 「あついカラダに、おいしい水分。」 above huge bold white stacked text "POCARI SWEAT" with a white wave mark, and bottom right small blue Japanese copy reading 「汗のあとに、ポカリスエット。」 plus tiny legal/footer text and website. Add exactly 2 product-bottle elements: one small bottle in the girl's hand and one large tilted condensation-covered plastic bottle cropped in the bottom-left foreground with the blue POCARI SWEAT label facing the viewer. Add a thin blue circular badge near the foreground bottle reading "ION SUPPLY DRINK". Place the year 2009 in small white type at the top right. Use clean commercial typography, strong blue-and-white brand palette, glossy condensation, summer freshness, realistic shadows, slight wide-angle lens perspective, and poster-ready sharp detail. Avoid extra people, extra bottles, messy text, or any watermark.
